title: ChatGPT 5.5 Coming Soon?

mentions.quoted_text: Torch operates a platform to unify medical records including lab results, prescriptions, and appointment notes while storing them in a format that's easily discoverable for AI.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenAI acquired Torch, a health tech startup unifying medical records for AI use.

facts.fact_value: Platform to unify medical records for AI discoverability

mentions.quoted_text: You Can With AI from KPMG. Season one was designed to be a set of real stories from real leaders making AI work in their organizations.
mentions.context_snippet: Another podcast hosted by the speaker called You Can With AI from KPMG.
mentions.review_reason: Podcast mentioned but podcast is not in locked taxonomy; needs review if podcast is acceptable or should be 'other'.

mentions.quoted_text: Things started pretty inauspiciously in August with the release of GPT-5.
mentions.context_snippet: Discussion of GPT-5 release and its problems including deprecation and perception issues.

facts.fact_value: Deprecation and poor perception of performance jump

mentions.quoted_text: When Gemini 3 came out, people were extremely excited about it.
mentions.context_snippet: Google released Gemini 3 in November, impressing many with its intellectual and work task performance.

facts.fact_value: Strong performance on intellectual and work tasks

mentions.quoted_text: Nano Banana Pro's ability to make infographics opened up all sorts of totally new possible use cases.
mentions.context_snippet: Part of Google's Gemini 3 model family with strong image generation capabilities.

mentions.quoted_text: That got us to GPT 5.2, as well as the new chat GPT images model.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenAI released GPT 5.2 and a new chat GPT images model as part of their core feature focus.

facts.fact_value: Reasoning model update and image generation 1.5 model

mentions.quoted_text: The opinion on this model has done nothing but go up and up and up and up.
mentions.context_snippet: Claude Opus 4.5 is considered by some to be the most important model release of 2025.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic released Cowork, tripling down in that way on their source of narrative momentum.
mentions.context_snippet: Cowork is a product released by Anthropic to broaden access to Claude Code.

facts.fact_value: Product to bring Claude Code to more users

mentions.quoted_text: Forthcoming versions of Apple Intelligence will be powered by Gemini models.
mentions.context_snippet: Google and Apple announced a deal that Apple Intelligence will use Gemini models.

facts.fact_value: Apple Intelligence to be powered by Gemini models

mentions.quoted_text: GPT 5.3 codenamed Garlic coming soon according to a source, a very reliable source, batting 1000.
mentions.context_snippet: Dan Mack tweeted rumors about GPT 5.3 codenamed Garlic coming soon.

facts.fact_value: GPT 5.3 Garlic model expected soon with stronger pre-training and reasoning

mentions.quoted_text: The 5.2 model that we got was a rushed early checkpoint and that the full model is going to drop in January.
mentions.context_snippet: AI leaker account I Rule the World shared info about GPT 5.2 being rushed and full model dropping soon.

facts.fact_value: GPT 5.2 was rushed early checkpoint; full model expected in January

mentions.quoted_text: My chat is acting quite differently as of last night. I assumed it was part of a new personality test group.
mentions.context_snippet: Andrew Curran tweeted about chat acting differently, possibly due to new personality test group.

mentions.mention_text: VB from OpenAI's developer experience team
mentions.quoted_text: VB from OpenAI's developer experience team posted the eyes emoji getting everyone talking.
mentions.context_snippet: VB's eyes emoji post sparked speculation about upcoming OpenAI model updates.

mentions.quoted_text: Hearing fresh detail on OpenAI 2Go hardware project from last report. Now confirmed it's a special audio product to replace AirPod.
mentions.context_snippet: Chinese consumer electronics blogger leaked details about OpenAI 2Go hardware project codenamed SweetPea.
mentions.review_reason: Unclear if this is a software product, hardware product, or other; no locked type fits well.

facts.fact_value: Audio hardware product to replace AirPods, codename SweetPea

mentions.quoted_text: Internal codename is SweetPea. A manufacturing Foxconn has been told to prepare for a total of 5 devices by Q4 2028.
mentions.context_snippet: SweetPea is the codename for the OpenAI 2Go hardware audio product.
mentions.review_reason: Hardware codename, unclear if product or project; no locked type fits well.

mentions.quoted_text: DeepSeek v4 will be released in mid-February and will have a heavy focus on coding performance.
mentions.context_snippet: DeepSeek v4 is the successor to v3 and reportedly outperforms models like Anthropx Quad and OpenAI's GPT series in coding.

facts.fact_value: Outperforms Anthropx Quad and OpenAI GPT series in coding

mentions.quoted_text: DeepSeek v4 outperformed existing models such as Anthropx Quad and OpenAI's GPT series in coding.
mentions.context_snippet: Anthropx Quad is a coding model benchmarked against by DeepSeek v4.

mentions.quoted_text: A model codenamed Beluga on LM Arena is our first look at the whale's next release.
mentions.context_snippet: LM Arena is a benchmark platform where the model Beluga was posted.

mentions.quoted_text: Beluga is our first look at the whale's next release.
mentions.context_snippet: Beluga is a rumored codename for DeepSeek's next model release.

mentions.quoted_text: VO31 ingredients to video allows users to upload reference images for characters, props and background to guide the video generation.
mentions.context_snippet: Google announced VO31 ingredients to video feature upgrade for more expressive and consistent video generation.

facts.fact_value: Upload reference images to guide video generation with better visual consistency

new_type_candidates.reason: Mention of another podcast 'You Can With AI' which is a media product but not in locked taxonomy
new_type_candidates.example_mention: You Can With AI from KPMG

notes: Podcast 'You Can With AI' mentioned but podcast is not in locked taxonomy; flagged for review.
OpenAI 2Go hardware project and SweetPea codename are hardware products but no hardware type exists; marked as 'other' with review needed.
All URLs are set to null except where explicitly given or clearly inferred from sponsor URLs.
Only meaningful references to models, organizations, persons central to claims, software products, accounts, and benchmarks were included.
Sentiment labels are mostly neutral or positive reflecting factual or optimistic commentary; negative sentiment assigned to NVIDIA chip ban and GPT-5 release issues.
